Christopher Cato

Senior Software Engineer & Architect

Hire Christopher Cato

I help teams stabilize, modernize, and extend complex software systems without losing sight of production reality. My work is strongest where backend services, integrations, data flows, cloud platforms, and existing business-critical systems meet.

Typical engagements include troubleshooting difficult system behavior, improving reliability and performance, designing pragmatic integration architecture, supporting cloud or data platform work, and leading incremental modernization of legacy systems.

I am available for senior hands-on engineering, architecture support, technical leadership, and focused advisory work.

Contact: christopher.cato@gmail.com
